response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with roughly 15 years of full-stack experience spanning web, mobile, and backend systems, including current hands-on work with TypeScript/Node.js and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) that directly matches the role's AI agent development requirement. He has demonstrated cloud (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker), database (MongoDB, MySQL), and testing/craftsmanship depth (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development). Gaps are mostly stack-specific: no Nest.js, no explicit Vitest/Jest/Playwright mention, limited React exposure relative to Ember, and no Kotlin or Python, but these are learnable given his polyglot track record.
strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience with current TypeScript/Node.js product work
Direct AI agent development experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks)
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing tools authorship, cloud and container deployment
concerns: No Nest.js experience listed, a core framework in the primary stack
Frontend history leans heavily on Ember.js; React exposure appears limited to one role
No explicit Vitest/Jest/Playwright or Kotlin/Python experience mentioned

key_factors.factor: Depth and breadth of full-stack experience
Missing primary-stack specifics (Nest.js, Vitest, limited React)
